resolution_summary: The PubMed snapshot provenance candidate is compatible for promotion despite path overlaps because it is a provenance-only repair: it adds three PubMed EFetch source_snapshot records and links source_snapshot_id provenance into existing DKD, IPF, and AD-risk records. It does not change extracted effect values, safety interpretation, taxonomy mapping, lifecycle status, or release status for the older broad coverage and exact-effect candidates. Those older candidates remain separately governed by their own review, revision, and promotion gates.

evidence.summary: The candidate ledger is limited to PubMed EFetch source-snapshot creation and source_snapshot_id provenance links for DKD, IPF, and AD-risk records.
The source-fidelity review accepts the PubMed snapshot provenance repair as source-located and non-blocking.
The extraction-fidelity review accepts the candidate because it does not mutate extracted values, sample sizes, timepoints, or interpretation claims.
The synthesis-boundary review accepts the candidate because provenance links do not broaden synthesis conclusions or remove existing caveats.
The broad coverage candidate remains in needs_revision and is not accepted, applied, or superseded by this decision.
The exact-effect extraction repair remains a separate submitted candidate with its own missing review lanes and is not accepted, applied, or superseded by this decision.
